name: Spiced Pumpkin Bread ABM
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring all ingredients to room temperature and mix them in a bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a baking dish, arranging it evenly.
3. Set the oven "baking control" at 11 o'clock.
4. Select "white bread" on the oven settings.
5. Turn off the baking control when finished cooking.
- In hot, humid weather, reduce water by 1/8 cup.
